# Mock customer report (Drive upload fixture)

End-of-quarter summary written for sanitiser testing. Every PII value
is fabricated; the strings are crafted to match testudo's regex
patterns so a successful run flags at least one finding in every
category.

## Contacts (mock)

- Alice Smith -- alice.smith@example.co.uk -- 07700 900111 -- SW1A 1AA
- Bola Adeyemi -- bola.adeyemi@example.org -- 07700 900222 -- M1 1AA
- Charlie Wong -- charlie.wong@example.net -- 07700 900333 -- EH1 1AA

- NHS number: 943 476 5919

- Date of birth: 14/02/1988

## Body

The retention queue grew by twelve percent quarter-over-quarter,
driven by the new ticketing template shipped in March. Q3 priorities
centre on cleanup of legacy schema columns and a pilot of the
redacted-export option for the customer team.

If you have questions, reach out to Charlie Wong on Slack or by
email; otherwise schedule a fifteen minute follow-up via the team
calendar by 2026-06-15.
